properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 131/19
SVALBARD/ GREENLAND SEA
TWO SCIENTIFIC ROCKETS WILL BE LAUNCHED FROM ANDOEYA SPACE CENTERS FACILITY AT NY-AALESUND, SVALBARD IN THE PERIOD 25 NOVEMBER - 12 DECEMBER 2019. THE LAUNCH WILL BE CONDUCTED BETWEEN 07:00-12:30 UTC. 

MARITIME TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THE FOLLOWING DANGER AREAS IN THE ANNOUNCED PERIOD:
DANGER AREA FORLANDSSUNDET: A. 78-54.0 N 011-29.0 EB. 78-51.0 N 011-42.0 EC. 78-49.0 N 011-30.0 ED. 78-52.0 N 011-16.0 E
DANGER AREA CHI:A. 76-48.0 N 000-00.0 EB. 76-12.0 N 000-00.0 EC. 76-12.0 N 002-35.0 ED. 76-48.0 N 002-35.0 E
DANGER AREA ICI-5:A. 78-19.0 N 006-10.0 EB. 78-19.0 N 008-36.0 EC. 77-48.0 N 008-36.0 ED. 77-48.0 N 006-10.0 E
 NAVAREA XIX 131/19
SVALBARD/ GREENLAND SEA
1. TWO SCIENTIFIC ROCKETS WILL BE LAUNCHED FROM ANDOEYA SPACE CENTERS FACILITY AT NY-AALESUND, SVALBARD IN THE PERIOD 25 NOVEMBER - 12 DECEMBER 2019. THE LAUNCH WILL BE CONDUCTED BETWEEN 07:00-12:30 UTC. 

MARITIME TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THE FOLLOWING DANGER AREAS IN THE ANNOUNCED PERIOD:
DANGER AREA FORLANDSSUNDET: A. 78-54.0 N 011-29.0 EB. 78-51.0 N 011-42.0 EC. 78-49.0 N 011-30.0 ED. 78-52.0 N 011-16.0 E
DANGER AREA CHI:A. 76-48.0 N 000-00.0 EB. 76-12.0 N 000-00.0 EC. 76-12.0 N 002-35.0 ED. 76-48.0 N 002-35.0 E
DANGER AREA ICI-5:A. 78-19.0 N 006-10.0 EB. 78-19.0 N 008-36.0 EC. 77-48.0 N 008-36.0 ED. 77-48.0 N 006-10.0 E
2. PREVIOUS HF WARNINGS ISSUED NAVAREA XIX 108/19
